title: PressCheckTolT Property
description:
This property sets the range of the end conditions related to force.

It is used when ForceCheckEnabled is True in a direction where Press is specified by ControlMode in Tx, Ty, and Tz directions.

Determine that the force in each direction is inside or outside of the range of

PressForce -PressCheckTolT to PressForce +PressCheckTolT.

Values

Minimum value 100

Maximum value 10000

Default:  500

See Also: PressCheckTolT Property

PressCheckTolF Property
see_also:
Applies To

Press Object, PressMove Object
